[Verse 1]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
We're in the homestretch of the hard[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
times[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
We took a hard left, but we're alright[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
through it, but[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
We built this right, so nothing's ever gonna move it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
When the bones are good, the rest don't matter[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Yeah, the paint could peel, the glass could shatter[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Let it rain 'cause you and I remain the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
same[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
When there ain't a crack in the foundation[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, I know any storm we're facing[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Will blow right over while we stay put                                             [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
The house don't fall when the bones are good[/tab]
